gate.name: Gallowsford Gate
gate.desc: Iron lanterns hang over the starving ditch.

inn.name: Black Lantern Inn
inn.desc: Too many back doors and too few honest cups.

chapel.name: Chapel Yard
chapel.desc: Saint Veyr watches from cracked stone.

ditch.name: Refugee Ditch
ditch.desc: Blankets rot in rain. Children cough.

road.name: South Road
road.desc: Ruts through mud and ash. Greyhook waits beyond.

mill.name: Miller's Ruin
mill.desc: The wheel is still. Crows refuse the roof.

shrine.name: Drowned Shrine
shrine.desc: Half a shrine sinks into black water.

grey_road.name: Greyhook Road
grey_road.desc: The road turns military: ditches cut clean, posts tarred black.

muster_field.name: Muster Field
muster_field.desc: Old banners flap above hard bread and dull spearheads.

quartermaster_tent.name: Quartermaster's Tent
quartermaster_tent.desc: Every sack, seal, and missing ration has a number here.

greyhook_gate.name: Greyhook Fortress Gate
greyhook_gate.desc: Greyhook rises like a clenched jaw. Three searches. No humor.

greyhook_outer_yard.name: Greyhook Outer Yard
greyhook_outer_yard.desc: Mud, shouted numbers, stacked crates, wet shields.

fortress_infirmary.name: Fortress Infirmary
fortress_infirmary.desc: Blood, vinegar, old prayers. Bandages cost favors.

synod_archive.name: Synod Archive Antechamber
synod_archive.desc: Not the true archive, only the waiting room.

lower_cells.name: Greyhook Lower Cells
lower_cells.desc: Every door has two locks: one for prisoners, one for secrets.

sealed_prisoner_cell.name: Sealed Prisoner Cell
sealed_prisoner_cell.desc: No nameplate. No lantern. Only a sealed slot and breathing iron.

free_writ.name: Free Spears Supply Writ
free_writ.text: A mercenary supply writ stamped in brown wax.

rookery_mark.name: Rookery Drain Mark
rookery_mark.text: A black pin scratched with a drain sign.

synod_token.name: Synod Rites Token
synod_token.text: A bell-marked token for dying soldiers.

refugee_path.name: Refugee Witness Mark
refugee_path.text: A charcoal sign copied from a child's memory.

greyhook_supply_contract.name: Greyhook Supply Contract
greyhook_supply_contract.text: Paid soldiers rarely argue with stamped supply rights.

greyhook_infirmary_seal.name: Greyhook Infirmary Seal
greyhook_infirmary_seal.text: White wax, bell mark, and a restriction against visible blades.

quartermaster_blackmail.name: Quartermaster Blackmail
quartermaster_blackmail.text: Names, quantities, and one mistress too many.

prisoner_transfer_forgery.name: Forged Prisoner Transfer Order
prisoner_transfer_forgery.text: From two steps away it looks like authority.

greyhook_search_stamp.name: Greyhook Search Stamp
greyhook_search_stamp.text: Proof you were searched, not trusted.

lower_cell_ring_key.name: Lower-Cell Ring Key
lower_cell_ring_key.text: A ring key small enough to hide beneath a bandage.

nameless_prisoner_note.name: Nameless Prisoner Note
nameless_prisoner_note.text: No rites. No visitors. No name. Crown witness.

prisoner_statement.name: Sealed Prisoner Statement
prisoner_statement.text: The Crown of Ash was a legal right to name the dead.

prisoner_transfer_token.name: Improvised Prisoner Transfer Token
prisoner_transfer_token.text: Enough wax and violence to move one prisoner.

silenced_witness_mark.name: Silenced Witness Mark
silenced_witness_mark.text: Proof that someone no longer speaks.

greyhook_betrayal_receipt.name: Greyhook Betrayal Receipt
greyhook_betrayal_receipt.text: A payment record that smells cleaner than the act.

greyhook_escape_mark.name: Greyhook Escape Mark
greyhook_escape_mark.text: A chalk mark near the drainage stair.

market_papers.name: Forged Watch Papers
market_papers.text: A clerk sells copies of dead men's passes.
market_papers.softFail: The clerk demands more coin, but points toward seal stock.

seal_stock.name: Seal Stock Trail
seal_stock.softFail: The merchant flees, leaving a quartermaster receipt.

rookery_drain.name: Rookery Drain Mark
rookery_drain.text: The Rookery whispers about an old drain.
rookery_drain.softFail: The drain is sealed; a ford smuggler knows more.

ford_smuggler.name: Ford Smuggler
ford_smuggler.text: River men sell the same truth cheaper.
ford_smuggler.softFail: He refuses coin but mentions a drain key.

free_writ.name: Free Spears Supply Writ
free_writ.text: A supply escort may enter the tower yard.
free_writ.softFail: The Compact asks for a road-clearance job.

road_clearance_job.name: Road Clearance Job
road_clearance_job.text: Clear trouble on the South Road to earn trust.
road_clearance_job.softFail: A wounded Free Spear owes you an introduction.

synod_rites.name: Last Rites Request
synod_rites.text: A dying deserter asked for rites.
synod_rites.softFail: The bell-ward blocks you; the infirmary clerk might not.

infirmary_clerk.name: Infirmary Clerk
infirmary_clerk.text: The clerk is tired flesh, not hard stone.
infirmary_clerk.softFail: The clerk refuses but gives a dying man's name.

refugee_witness.name: Refugee Witness
refugee_witness.text: A refugee child saw the deserter supply path.
refugee_witness.softFail: The camp stays silent while hungry.

food_relief_need.name: Relief Food Need
food_relief_need.text: Truth can be bought with food, medicine, or mercy.
food_relief_need.softFail: A child follows you at a distance.

greyhook_supply.name: Greyhook Supply Contract
greyhook_supply.text: A supply queue enters Greyhook at dusk.
greyhook_supply.softFail: The Free Spears name a quartermaster who sells favors.

greyhook_quartermaster.name: Quartermaster's Weakness
greyhook_quartermaster.text: The quartermaster's numbers do not add up.
greyhook_quartermaster.softFail: He posts your description at the gate.

greyhook_infirmary.name: Infirmary Rites
greyhook_infirmary.text: The Synod can enter if it accepts responsibility for the dying.
greyhook_infirmary.softFail: The surgeon whispers that one prisoner has no name.

greyhook_transfer.name: Prisoner Transfer Forgery
greyhook_transfer.text: A forged order might reach the lower cells.

greyhook_escape_route.name: Greyhook Escape Route
greyhook_escape_route.text: When alert rises, the question becomes how to leave.
greyhook_escape_route.softFail: The route works, but someone is wounded.

nell.name: Nell Quickhands
nell.text: Funny until the purse is gone.

miren.name: Miren Ash-Eyed
miren.effect: Learns an enemy weakness at a cost.
